promotionalText: Blast asteroids, dodge enemies, and power up in Kaden & Adelynn Space Adventures!
description: Kaden & Adelynn Space Adventures is a fast-paced arcade shooter. Choose your character and ship, upgrade weapons, collect power-ups, and climb the leaderboards! Features Game Center, iCloud saves, accessibility, and more.
keywords: space, arcade, shooter, kids, leaderboard, powerup, adventure
